name: Industry template

**Industry:** (e.g., e-commerce, SaaS, consulting, healthcare)
**Typical team size:** (e.g., 2-5 people)
**Process type:** (e.g., order fulfillment, client onboarding)

**Why this template is useful:**


**Checklist:**
- [ ] Company profile follows `templates/company.md` format
- [ ] Process description follows `templates/process.md` format
- [ ] Includes realistic tool stack, costs, and pain points
- [ ] Tested by running an analysis with the template
